CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUN LIMOUSINE CREATIONS, INC. KANE, MARK CURTIS, STEVEN POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH RE EQUIPMENT ( MARKET VALUE $ 1,500.00 ), OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $4,622.36 DAMAGES, $775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $393.50 COSTS, $95.76 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,886.62, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
